calendar.matters:
Petition Regarding Title To Or Possession Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alice Brown Traeg for Gloria Usher. Maryann Dresner for and with Humberto Rodriguez.

The Parties presented argument to support their positions with respect to the issue regarding Gloria Usher having to pay rent. Ms. Traeg stated that Ms. Usher paid the property taxes, the insurance and paid for repairs. In addition, she stated that Carmen De Luz was not a party to this interest and had no claim. The Court denied the petition. The Court found that it was the intent of Jose that Gloria live in the property without having to pay rent during her lifetime. Ms. Traeg will prepare the order.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition Re: Title To Or Possession Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Re: Title To Or Possession Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Continued To Feb-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
